remember: Students will be able to recall key events and developments in Indian politics
Students will be able to identify and list major changes in the Indian political landscape
Students will be able to recall the role of key institutions and actors in shaping recent developments
understand: Students will be able to explain the causes and consequences of recent developments in Indian politics
Students will be able to analyze the impact of globalization and technology on Indian politics
Students will be able to understand the evolving role of civil society and media in Indian politics
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of democratization and globalization to recent developments in Indian politics
Students will be able to use case studies to analyze the impact of recent developments on different sections of Indian society
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different institutions and actors in promoting democratic values and practices
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the complex relationships between different institutions and actors in shaping recent developments in Indian politics
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of recent developments on the overall health of Indian democracy
Students will be able to identify areas of concern and suggest potential solutions for promoting democratic values and practices

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the transformation of Indian politics and the role of key institutions and actors in shaping recent developments
Students will be able to analyze the impact of globalization and technology on Indian politics and the evolving role of civil society and media
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different institutions and actors in promoting democratic values and practices
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability of students to recall key events and developments in Indian politics
Students are required to explain the causes and consequences of recent developments in Indian politics
CBSE assesses the ability of students to analyze the impact of recent developments on different sections of Indian society
